title: Oath of office and bond of pilots
doc_html:
§1074.  Oath of office and bond of pilots

All the pilots shall take an oath of office and furnish bond to the extent of one thousand dollars approved by the board of examiners of each port.
doc_text:
§1074.  Oath of office and bond of pilots
All the pilots shall take an oath of office and furnish bond to the extent of one thousand dollars approved by the board of examiners of each port.
